title: (Nonrecord) Async Prefetching
author: SirSaltySalmon

data.description: Asynchronous prefetching of training and validation batches to overlap CPU data preparation and host-to-device copies with GPU compute, reducing GPU idle time and pipeline bubbles under fixed wall-clock budget.

parameters.training_batch_prefetch: Background thread builds next pinned CPU batch while GPU runs current step
parameters.h2d_copy_stream: Optional dedicated CUDA copy stream with pinned memory and wait_stream synchronization
parameters.validation_prefetch: Prefetch thread for pinned CPU batches with double-buffered H2D using copy stream and events

default_env_vars.TRAINING_TIMING_BREAKDOWN: off by default, disables prefetch/overlap when on

parameters.val_bytecount_device: cpu by default, can be set to cuda to mirror baseline GPU byte math

novel_contributions: Overlap CPU data preparation and host-to-device (H2D) memory copies with GPU compute to reduce GPU idle time.
Use background threads to asynchronously prefetch training and validation batches with pinned CPU memory.
Introduce optional dedicated CUDA copy streams for H2D transfers to enable parallelism with GPU compute.
Double-buffered H2D for validation batches allowing next batch to copy while current batch is processed.
Add TRAINING_TIMING_BREAKDOWN diagnostic to measure time spent in batch CPU prep, H2D, forward/backward, optimizer, and validation stages.
Automatic disabling of prefetch/overlap features when timing diagnostics are enabled to keep timings interpretable.
Default validation byte counting moved to CPU to reduce GPU load during validation.
